mapper.select: SELECT l.*, u.name AS admin_name FROM admin_action_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = l.admin_id ORDER BY l.log_id DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT l.*, u.name AS admin_name FROM admin_action_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = l.admin_id
ORDER BY l.log_id ASC
ORDER BY l.target_type ASC, l.target_id ASC, l.log_id DESC
ORDER BY u.name ASC, l.log_id DESC
ORDER BY l.log_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_action_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = l.admin_id

if.test: targetType != null and targetType != '' and targetType != 'all'
actionType != null and actionType != '' and actionType != 'all'
status != null and status != '' and status != 'all'

where.if: AND ( UPPER(l.before_status) = UPPER(#{status}) OR UPPER(l.after_status) = UPPER(#{status}) )

AND ( CAST(l.log_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(l.target_id AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.target_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.action_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.before_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.after_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR l.memo LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select: SELECT l.*, u.name AS admin_name FROM admin_action_logs l LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = l.admin_id WHERE l.target_type = #{target_type} AND l.target_id = #{target_id} ORDER BY l.log_id DESC
